default_rule: When jurisdiction-specific rights are unclear, block production publication and allow metadata/text-only demonstration use.

rules.rule: Check public-domain status, rights advisory, privacy/publicity, and trademark issues before commercial publication.
Check copyright term, database rights, museum open-access terms, and moral rights attribution.
Check copyright term, database rights, cultural heritage restrictions, and attribution requirements.
Check monument/heritage photography restrictions, copyright, and cultural sensitivity before product use.
Check local heritage, image, and cultural property restrictions before commercial use.
Apply the most restrictive relevant source/license term until item-level rights review is complete.
Use metadata/text-only until source-specific, asset-level rights and permitted uses are documented.
